description: Aggressive W-shaped correction tune for Lyne Photon 35 (budget V-shape dynamic driver). Compensates for recessed mids and uncontrolled 8kHz region with deliberately stronger correction than Harman target, on the basis that low-quality drivers need more aggressive correction than reference-grade drivers.
notes: Bass Boost/Loudness/Virtualizer kept off for the reference tune. Optional alt configs (34% bass boost, 14% virtualizer) tested separately as situational 'modes', not part of the core curve.
